message:
chore(beads): close bd-27du.9 control_lane_mapping audit log capacity bead

Mark bd-27du.9 as closed after implementing bounded-capacity guard for
ControlLaneScheduler audit_log with deterministic oldest-first eviction
and passing targeted rch validation evidence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-27du.7","title":"bd-27du support: cap virtual_transport_faults fault/audit logs with deterministic eviction","description":"Implement bounded-capacity guards for VirtualTransportFaultHarness fault_log and audit_log in crates/franken-node/src/remote/virtual_transport_faults.rs with deterministic oldest-first eviction and regression tests.","notes":"Implemented bounded-capacity guards for VirtualTransportFaultHarness fault_log and audit_log with deterministic oldest-first eviction. Added clamp-to-one constructor behavior plus focused eviction regression tests. Validation via rch: cargo fmt --check completed without formatting diagnostics; cargo test -p frankenengine-node virtual_transport_faults -- --nocapture passed (22 tests in lib + 22 in bin). Broad cargo check -p frankenengine-node --all-targets exited 137 after ~302s while still compiling the full package graph; cargo clippy -p frankenengine-node --all-targets -- -D warnings exited 137 after ~324s immediately after finishing the dev profile build, with no lint diagnostics emitted for this file.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldBear","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:10:27.488483564Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-05T23:44:01.881983008Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T23:44:01.881954966Z","close_reason":"Implemented bounded virtual_transport_faults logs with targeted rch validation green; broad all-targets gates hit rch timeout budget","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-27du.7","depends_on_id":"bd-27du","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:10:27.488483564Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-27du.8","title":"bd-27du support: cap cancellation_protocol audit log with deterministic eviction","description":"Implement bounded-capacity guard for CancellationProtocol audit_log in crates/franken-node/src/control_plane/cancellation_protocol.rs with deterministic oldest-first eviction, targeted regression tests, and rch-offloaded validation evidence.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldBear","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:47:25.178515425Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T00:05:35.922965177Z","closed_at":"2026-03-06T00:05:35.922931655Z","close_reason":"Completed bounded cancellation_protocol audit log guard with targeted rch validation evidence","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-27du.8","depends_on_id":"bd-27du","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:47:25.178515425Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":110,"issue_id":"bd-27du.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented bounded-capacity guard for control_plane/cancellation_protocol.rs audit_log via DEFAULT_MAX_AUDIT_LOG_ENTRIES + with_audit_log_capacity(...), routed all audit writes through a bounded helper, and added regression tests for clamp-to-one plus oldest-first eviction. Validation: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch_target_boldbear cargo test -p frankenengine-node cancellation_protocol -- --nocapture -> exit 0 on 2026-03-06; both lib and bin cancellation_protocol test slices passed, including the two new control_plane audit-capacity tests. Local environment note: / is effectively full (~560K free), so shell work had to avoid zsh init cache writes.","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:05:32Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-27du.9","title":"bd-27du support: cap control_lane_mapping audit log with deterministic eviction","description":"Implement bounded-capacity guard for ControlLaneScheduler audit_log in crates/franken-node/src/control_plane/control_lane_mapping.rs with deterministic oldest-first eviction, targeted regression tests, and rch-offloaded validation evidence.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldBear","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:08:24.055516213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T00:08:24.055516213Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-27du.9","depends_on_id":"bd-27du","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:08:24.055516213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-27du.9","title":"bd-27du support: cap control_lane_mapping audit log with deterministic eviction","description":"Implement bounded-capacity guard for ControlLaneScheduler audit_log in crates/franken-node/src/control_plane/control_lane_mapping.rs with deterministic oldest-first eviction, targeted regression tests, and rch-offloaded validation evidence.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BoldBear","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:08:24.055516213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-06T00:22:38.550091807Z","closed_at":"2026-03-06T00:22:38.550058205Z","close_reason":"Completed bounded control_lane_mapping audit log guard with targeted rch validation evidence","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-27du.9","depends_on_id":"bd-27du","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:08:24.055516213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":111,"issue_id":"bd-27du.9","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented bounded-capacity guard for control_plane/control_lane_mapping.rs audit_log via DEFAULT_MAX_AUDIT_LOG_ENTRIES + with_audit_log_capacity(...), routed audit writes through a bounded helper, and added regression tests for clamp-to-one plus oldest-first eviction. Validation: first rch run caught a real borrow-scope failure (E0499) in advance_tick; follow-up narrowed the counters mutable-borrow scope and reran clean. Final evidence: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/rch_target_boldbear cargo test -p frankenengine-node control_lane_mapping -- --nocapture -> exit 0 on 2026-03-06; both lib and bin control_lane_mapping test slices passed, including the two new audit-capacity tests.","created_at":"2026-03-06T00:22:38Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-27o2","title":"[10.14] Add profile tuning harness and publish benchmark-driven policy updates as signed artifacts.","description":"## Why This Exists
The per-class policy defaults (bd-8tvs) are only as trustworthy as the benchmark data behind them. As hardware changes, workload profiles shift, or new object classes are added, the tuning parameters must be re-derived. The 9J enhancement map requires a reproducible harness that can recompute candidate policy updates from fresh benchmarks, sign them to establish provenance, and reject any update that would regress safety-critical performance thresholds. Without this harness, policy drift becomes undetectable and operators lose confidence in the tuning layer.

## What This Must Do
1. Implement a profile tuning harness at `tools/profile_tuning_harness.rs` (standalone tool or integration into the build system) that: (a) runs the benchmark suite from bd-8tvs, (b) compares results against the current baseline in `artifacts/10.14/object_class_policy_report.csv`, (c) computes candidate policy updates with delta analysis.
2. Candidate updates must be serialized as a signed artifact bundle at `artifacts/10.14/signed_policy_update_bundle.json` containing: new proposed values, benchmark provenance (hardware fingerprint, timestamp, run ID), delta from previous baseline, and a cryptographic signature (HMAC-SHA256 or Ed25519 depending on security module availability).
3. Implement automatic regression rejection: if any candidate update would degrade p99 encode/decode latency by more than a configurable threshold (default 20%), the harness must reject the update and emit a structured diagnostic.
4. Write specification at `docs/specs/policy_update_signing.md` covering: signing key management, provenance chain requirements, update application workflow, and rollback procedure.
5. Harness must be idempotent — running it twice with the same benchmark data produces identical signed bundles.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Harness recomputes candidate policy updates reproducibly; identical benchmark data produces identical output bundles.
- Updates are signed and linked to benchmark provenance (hardware fingerprint, run timestamp, benchmark run ID).
- Unsafe regressions are auto-rejected: any candidate that degrades p99 latency beyond configurable threshold is blocked with diagnostic output.
- Signed bundle includes delta analysis showing old vs. new values for every tuning parameter.
- Harness validates signature on read-back (round-trip integrity check).
- Provenance chain is auditable: each signed bundle references the previous bundle's hash.

## Testing & Logging Requirements
- **Unit tests**: Signature generation and verification round-trip; delta computation correctness (known input -> expected delta); regression threshold check with values above and below threshold.
- **Integration tests**: Full harness run with synthetic benchmark data producing a signed bundle; harness run with regressed synthetic data producing rejection diagnostic; idempotency test (two runs, identical output).
- **Conformance tests**: Signed bundle schema validation against JSON schema; provenance chain integrity verification across multiple sequential updates.
- **Event codes**: `PT_HARNESS_START` (harness invocation), `PT_BENCHMARK_COMPLETE` (benchmark phase done), `PT_CANDIDATE_COMPUTED` (delta analysis complete), `PT_REGRESSION_REJECTED` (unsafe update blocked), `PT_BUNDLE_SIGNED` (signed artifact produced), `PT_BUNDLE_VERIFIED` (read-back integrity confirmed).
- **Replay fixture**: Synthetic benchmark result set with known expected policy update output.

## Expected Artifacts
- `tools/profile_tuning_harness.rs` — harness implementation
- `docs/specs/policy_update_signing.md` — signing and provenance specification
- `artifacts/10.14/signed_policy_update_bundle.json` — signed policy update bundle
- `artifacts/section_10_14/bd-27o2/verification_evidence.json` — CI/release gating evidence
- `artifacts/section_10_14/bd-27o2/verification_summary.md` — human-readable summary

## Dependencies
- **Depends on**: bd-8tvs (per-class policy engine — provides benchmark suite and baseline data this harness consumes)
- **Depended on by**: bd-3epz (section gate), bd-5rh (section roll-up)","acceptance_criteria":"Harness recomputes candidate policy updates reproducibly; updates are signed and linked to benchmark provenance; unsafe regressions are auto-rejected.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCrane","created_at":"2026-02-20T07:36:57.222598430Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-20T20:15:57.562492410Z","closed_at":"2026-02-20T20:15:57.562458938Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["plan","section-10-14","self-contained","test-obligations"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-27o2","depends_on_id":"bd-8tvs","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-20T07:43:15.273847616Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Replace map_or(default, f) with f().unwrap_or(default) or equivalent idiomatic patterns as clippy suggests.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CobaltCat","created_at":"2026-02-22T20:11:23.409043314Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-22T20:15:40.858118181Z","closed_at":"2026-02-22T20:15:40.858096321Z","close_reason":"Fixed all 15 clippy map_or warnings: 7 map_or(true,...) → is_none_or(), 8 map_or(false,...) → is_some_and(). Apply any corrective fixes + tests discovered.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"NavyPuma","created_at":"2026-02-25T19:19:20.407570825Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T19:32:29.310560893Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T19:32:29.310536348Z","close_reason":"Completed second fresh-eyes pass: reordered remote-cap rechecks before invariant evaluation, added regression coverage, and integrated no-op compensation/crash-recovery pending-path hardening. Validation: rustfmt check pass; cargo check --lib pass via rch; full connector test command currently blocked by unrelated audience_token.rs E0425 errors in test compile.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["connector","eviction-saga","hardening"]}
